privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated fisheries data. The python generation script mathematically outputs 179 total fish (contradicting the metadata claim of 180) and exactly 24 nets. The mean CPUE is ~7.46 (contradicting the 7.5 claim). The PSD is ~56.58% and mean Wr is ~95.14, both of which correctly fall within their claimed metadata ranges. The expected output file path is exactly /home/ga/Documents/Spreadsheets/vermilion_walleye_assessment.xlsx.
